content.heading: BarkinMad Studios
content.text: BarkinMad Studios is an independent UK software and game development company creating mobile applications, games, business software, internal tools, and digital solutions for both clients and its own growing portfolio of products.

content.heading: Company Details
content.text: Company Name: BarkinMad Studios Ltd. Company Number: 10743295. Registered in England and Wales.

content.heading: What We Do
content.text: The studio specialises in mobile application development, game development, custom software, business process improvement, internal business tools, websites, content platforms, and proof-of-concept projects. Every solution is designed with a focus on usability, performance, and long-term value.

content.heading: Products
content.text: BarkinMad Studios develops and publishes a growing range of applications and games, including [The Game Of Darts](/apps/gameofdarts) and the [ZX Series](/zx-series) of retro-inspired arcade games. Current and planned titles include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), ZXMaze, ZXRacer, ZXTank, and ZXLabrador.

content.heading: Founder
content.text: BarkinMad Studios was founded by Barry King, a software engineer and security professional with experience designing, developing, supporting, and securing business and consumer technology solutions across a wide range of industries.

content.heading: Our Approach
content.text: The goal is to create software that is useful, enjoyable, and built to last. Every project places a strong emphasis on quality, security, usability, and long-term support, with technology used to solve real problems, create engaging experiences, and deliver lasting value.

content.heading: Technology
content.text: The studio develops software using modern cloud and mobile technologies, including native mobile application development, Microsoft 365, Azure, automation platforms, web technologies, cloud-hosted services, and secure API integrations.

content.heading: Business Information
content.text: BarkinMad Studios operates as a UK registered limited company. Company registration details are publicly available through Companies House.

content.heading: Contact
content.text: For business enquiries, support requests, partnership opportunities, or general questions, please visit the [Contact](/contact) page.
